content.en:
Sioux Domain.

"Ye Tian has broken through to the Ninefold Dao Realm?"

Su Ya was very surprised.

After all, it didn't take long for Ye Tian to break through to the Eightfold Dao Realm!

The Eightfold Dao Realm of the Eightfold Dao Realm of the Strongest Dao Realm, it is extremely difficult to ascend to a small realm, not to mention breaking through from the early stage of the Eightfold Dao Realm to the early stage of the Ninefold Dao Realm, which has crossed too much in between.

"Unless Ye Tian can obtain two drops of Agar Essence to Dao Gold Liquid, it is absolutely impossible to break through so quickly!"

Su Ya thought so.

"Agar Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid, shouldn't he really exchange two drops of Agar Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid?" Su Ya thought to herself.

If that's the case, then Ye Tian is inevitably too rich!

......

Qin.

Qin Ming was also shocked when he learned that Ye Tian had broken through to the Ninefold Dao Realm, Ye Tian's growth speed was too fast and terrifying.

He was afraid that Ye Tian would be reckless enough to deal with him directly, so he was so frightened that he didn't dare to leave the Qin Domain.

After all, a ninefold Dao realm that walks the strongest to the Dao realm, and its combat power is comparable to that of the ordinary legendary Dao realm, if you really want to kill him, the legendary Dao realm can't stop it.

Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tianxiu made a breakthrough, but he was still in the stable realm.

After a period of time, his cultivation made a breakthrough, and one after another Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm came to visit him, and many of them who had taken the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm also wanted to befriend him.

Even, there were several legendary Dao realm powerhouses, all of whom came to visit him.

Ye Tian dealt with them one by one, and he could be regarded as knowing them.

In addition, the ancient emperor of Longyan also came.

Of course.

Ye Tian also held a feast to celebrate his breakthrough to the Ninefold Dao Realm.

......

After a period of time, Ye Tian scraped together another 100 million Eternal Gold Coins, and exchanged them for a drop of Agar Essence Dao Gold Liquid.

He wanted to use the Qiong Jelly to Dao Golden Liquid to quickly improve his cultivation, but this time he was disappointed.

He refined a drop of Agar Essence Dao Gold Liquid, but found that his cultivation was still in the early stage of the Ninefold Dao Realm, and he was still far from the middle stage of the Ninefold Dao Realm.

"My physical fitness is actually comparable to the Legendary Dao Realm, far surpassing the other Ninefold Dao Realms I don't know how many times, the Qiong Jelly Dao Golden Liquid is still useful to me, but it doesn't have that much effect. If you want to improve from the early stage of the Ninefold to the Dao Realm to the middle stage of the Ninefold Dao Realm, you need at least dozens of drops of Qiong Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid. Ye Tian said darkly.

At this moment, he finally knew why most of the Ninefold Dao Realm who visited him were in the early and middle stages of the Ninefold Dao Realm, it was really too difficult to improve their cultivation, and it took too much time and resources.

And for them, if they want to become the Legendary Dao Realm, they not only need to raise their cultivation to the peak of the Ninefold Dao Realm, but they also have to comprehend the rules of the Third Sequence Dao Dao.

If there is not much chance, their future will be the Nine Levels of Dao Realm.

"For ordinary geniuses, it is indeed not a good thing to walk the path of the strongest to the Dao!" Ye Tian said darkly.

After all, in the late stage, it is becoming more and more difficult to fight beyond the level.

For example, the Ninefold Dao Realm who took the path of the strongest to the Dao, even if the cultivation broke through to the Legendary Dao Realm, compared to those elders, the gap in strength was still too big.

So, what is the meaning of walking to the Tao?

This is also the reason why many top forces do not want to cultivate the Supreme Dao Realm that takes the path of the strongest to the Dao, it is not cost-effective, and they do not lack the Ninefold Dao Realm.

"Cultivation is a problem, don't be in a hurry for the time being, the elixir to the Dao gold liquid is exchanged drop by drop, and it is not difficult to cultivate to the middle stage of the Ninefold Dao Realm, but the difficult thing is how to improve to the late stage of the Ninefold Dao Realm and the peak!"

Ye Tian muttered.

There is also the comprehension of the third sequence of supreme path rules, which is also the most important thing for the purpose.

"Lost Domain, it's up to you whether you can quickly comprehend the rules of the third sequence of supreme paths!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

The Lost Realm.

Ye Tian changed the copy body, and the copy body here became the early stage cultivation of the Nine Folds Dao Realm.

Subsequently.

He came to an area that he had not dared to enter before.

With his current strength, he is enough to match the legendary creatures.

this day.

Ye Tian once again encountered the golden-winged Gu Peng who killed him, this legendary-level creature, and now he was not so much of a threat to himself.

In the past, he was an ant killed by the other party, but now he can look at the other party directly.

Airplanes!

The golden-winged Gu Peng saw Ye Tian and directly launched an attack, and the golden light wave swept over.

However.

Ye Tian used the fourth sequence of the Ten Percent Realm to use the Fourth Sequence of the Dao Divine Power to the Dao Vajra Body to protect his body, coupled with his own body comparable to the legendary Dao Realm, he stubbornly blocked this wave of attacks.

"Sure enough, Golden-Winged Gu Peng can't kill me!"

Ye Tian held the Nine Patterns Supreme Dao Weapon Spear and killed this golden-winged Gu Peng.

Bang!!!!

A big war has begun!

The Golden-Winged Gu Peng's body was too tough, and even if Ye Tian's attack landed on its body, it only left one mark after another, and it was impossible to break its body.

And the golden-winged Gu Peng couldn't hurt Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian's Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules were higher than its realm, and after a long time, the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules gradually cracked the legendary body of the Golden-Winged Gu Peng.

For a while, Golden-winged Gu Peng began to get injured.

Wow!

It quickly ran away, and chose to flee directly.

Ye Tian didn't chase after him, after all, with his current strength, it was still a little difficult to kill the Golden-winged Gu Peng.

Subsequently.

He entered the territory of the Golden-Winged Gu Peng, where he collected resources.

"What a treasure!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

After some scraping, he even found sixteen fourth-order Supreme Dao rule items, but the best quality was only high-grade, and the others were low-quality fourth-order Supreme Dao rule items.

In addition, there are also a lot of precious resources, many of which surpass the resources of Longyan Linshi.

"It's all good things, keep it, maybe I will break through to the Legendary Dao Realm in the future, and when I want to condense the top-level Legendary Body, these materials will come in handy!" Ye Tian thought.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian kept looking for trouble with other legendary-level creatures and scraped their territorial resources.

Gradually, Ye Tian harvested more and more.

this day.

He came to the heart of the Lost Realm.

Here, he saw a legendary creature with extremely terrifying strength and much more powerful than other legendary-level creatures - the Ancient Giant Bird!

The name of this legendary creature is not very domineering, but its strength is truly terrifying.

Ye Tian came to its territory and was directly hit hard by the other party's several moves.

In desperation, Ye Tian chose to escape.

"The strength of this Xuangu Giant Bird is too terrifying, it seems that it is necessary to send multiple True Body Replica Bodies, trap them, and send another Replica Body to collect resources, this is the easiest way!" Ye Tian also decided to do so.
